runners.formComment: In the money last time at this track (25.98) in a Grade 5, finishing a 4 length third. Box stats strong with three wins and two placings from six starts. Makes strong appeal.

runners.formComment: Found some support last start but struggled and finished 5th in a OPEN on April 4 over 457m at this track behind Hara's Neo beaten 5 lengths (25.88). Placed two back at this track. Around the mark two starts back. Winning chance on that form.

runners.formComment: Good effort to win last start by 2 lengths over 457m at this track in a handy (25.37), beating Idea's Girl. Will find this a bit tougher, be tough to make an impression against this lot.

runners.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 457m. Last start finished 3rd over 457m at this track beaten one length (25.94) behind Spring Flick in a Restricted WIN on April 7. Has an excellent 25.26 best time at this course and distance. Big chance.

runners.formComment: Placed last time (21.75) at this track in a Grade 3/4, finishing second and beaten half a length. Box stats strong with three wins and three placings from six starts. Can hit the frame with the right run.
